title: Mixed Performances In Chinese Renewables Last Month
section_path: Mixed Performances In Chinese Renewables Last Month
section_path_text: Mixed Performances In Chinese Renewables Last Month
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore's most recent Weekly Dry Bulk Report, China's hydropower production totaled only 68.4 billion kilowatt hours last month. This is the same amount that was produced in February and is down year-on-year by 12.1 billion kilowatt hours (-15%). This weakness has contributed to significant strength in China's thermal coal burn.
